data.name: CuckoldxCosplay 绝色扮演 真绮篇 1
data.detailed_description:
絕色扮演 真綺篇 1 有聲漫畫/視覺小說
（中文字幕/介面，日文配音。）

情節概述：
有著NTR情結的男主角伊奈律，在一次偶然的機會鼓起勇氣向妻子真綺表達了自己的想法，儘管不知道自己能否承受這個後果，但可以確定的是：隨後發生的事情將不可逆轉 ……

關於遊戲：
- 本作是使用renpy製作的有聲漫畫，以galgame形式展現nanomo的成人NTR漫畫'絕色扮演 真綺篇' 第1話的內容。
- 介面和字幕語言為中文，女聲配音為日語，無男聲。
- 圖片共162張，內容與漫畫原作相同，沒有額外情節。
- 劇情為成人NTR向，玩家會以galgame形式體驗這部有聲漫畫，情節只有一條主線，遊戲中沒有不同選擇、或改變劇情的操作。

關於操作：
滑鼠滾輪向上：回滾上一頁
滑鼠滾輪向下：進入下一頁
滑鼠左鍵點擊：進入下一頁
滑鼠右鍵點擊：進入選單
滑鼠懸停在存檔上+鍵盤按下delete鍵：刪除所選存檔

日文*, 簡體中文, 英文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: win7
  • 處理器: i3
  • 顯示卡: basic
  • 音效卡: basic
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: win10

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: mac OS
  • 處理器: Apple M1

data.name: CuckoldxCosplay 绝色扮演 ネトラレイヤー 真绮篇1
data.detailed_description:
CuckoldxCosplay: Maki Chapter1 [Audio Comic/Visual Novel]
(English subtitles/interface, Japanese language audio.)

About the story:
Caught in the grips of an NTR complex, Ritsu takes a leap of faith, opening up to his wife Maki in a serendipitous moment. The consequences remain uncertain, yet one thing is undeniable: what unfolds next will be irreversible.

About the game:
- This is a visual novel made with renpy, showing the content of the first chapter of nanomo's adult NTR comic "CuckoldxCosplay: Maki Chapter1" in the form of galgame.
- The interface and subtitle language is English, the female voice audio is Japanese, and there is no male voice.
- There are 162 pictures in total, the content is the same as the original comic, and there are no additional content.
- Players will experience this audio comic in the form of galgame. The plot has only one main line. There are no different choices or options to change the plot in the game.

About operation:
Mouse wheel up: scroll back to the previous page
Mouse wheel down: Go to next page
Left click of mouse: go to next page
Right click of mouse: enter menu
Hover the mouse over the archive + press the delete key on the keyboard: delete the selected archive
